content:
type: DEFER
files: outlines/types/__init__.py
spec: Add a new module-level type definition named hash_sha256 in outlines/types/__init__.py, placed after the existing isbn definition. Definition: hash_sha256 = Regex(r'[a-fA-F0-9]{64}'). This validates SHA-256 hash strings: exactly 64 hexadecimal characters (0-9, a-f, A-F), case-insensitive. It must be a plain Regex instance (from outlines.types.dsl import Regex, already imported in the file) so it inherits Term.validate(), __get_pydantic_core_schema__, __get_pydantic_json_schema__, and DSL operations (optional, at_least, etc.) automatically. No other logic needed - just the one-line definition with the regex pattern '[a-fA-F0-9]{64}'.
note: hash_sha256 type per feature spec; thanks for owning the file
